intentSynonyms: remove an emoji reaction from a message in slack
description: Remove an emoji reaction from a Slack message

channel.description: Channel ID where the message is located (e.g., C01234567)

ts.description: Timestamp of the message to remove the reaction from — serves as the unique message ID (e.g., 1234567890.123456)

name.description: Emoji name without colons (e.g., thumbsup, heart, rocket)
